title: Roses
description: i miss the classic roses, dont you?
body:
this mod brings back the classic roses and other classic flowers to minecraft, without replacing any newer flower types.

## features
- roses and potted Roses
- cyan flowers (potted cyan flowers)
- rose bushes drop roses
- 2x2 roses in a crafting table will output a rose bush (and cyan rose bush)
- bees can pollinate all flowers

> runs under sinytra connector!!! (make sure you have [FFA](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api), [CE](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector-extras), [SC](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)

![made with fabric 88x31 badge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/566134d54a0d603a50b616650bc189ef3f3ed9b8.png)
